title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Brookfield India REIT - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Brookfield India REIT - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Brookfield India REIT in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Brookfield India REIT:
Brookfield India REIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brookfield India REIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
